prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `8cb8642d`.
codex_response:
Implemented `8cb8642d` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: each multicolored filled rectangle keeps its outer border, its interior is cleared to black, and the marker color is drawn as the corners of successive inset boxes, with the final innermost box filled. I used the summary hint as a starting point, but tightened it to that exact concentric-box formulation. No new reusable primitive was needed.

Code is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8cb8642d/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8cb8642d/verifier.py#L6), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8cb8642d/generator.py#L10), and [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8cb8642d/helpers.py#L4). The helper is task-local and only handles rectangle construction plus the concentric inset-corner pattern reused by both verifier and generator.

Validation passed end-to-end: official verifier `4/4`, generated verifier `1000/1000`, and the shared builder produced [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8cb8642d/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8cb8642d/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8cb8642d/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8cb8642d/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8cb8642d/previews/preview_03.png). I couldn’t use the dedicated local image-view tool on a self-generated path, so I sanity-checked the rebuilt set through the generated task data and preview-file emission instead.
